title: Trip Expenses Tracker
description: A full-stack group trip expense manager — track who paid what, split costs fairly, and visualise balances in real time. Built with React and PostgreSQL, deployed on Vercel for instant access on any device.

title: Borewell Invoice Generator
description: Custom invoice generation tool for Vinayaka Borewells — create, preview, and print professional invoices with dynamic line items, auto tax calculation, and one-click PDF export. Zero backend required.

title: RubberFlow Blueprint
description: An open-source workflow automation blueprint for manufacturing QA — modelling operational flows, test triggers, and process monitoring pipelines. Architectural patterns for quality engineering in industrial domains.

title: Ryder Data Processor
description: End-to-end enterprise data processing system in Java using Kafka for real-time streaming and MongoDB for storage, surfaced through DOMO dashboards for business reporting and analytics.

title: JPRA Workflow Automation
description: Automated manual operational workflows using Java and Groovy scripts, significantly increasing process efficiency and reducing human error across finance and operations teams.

title: AI Chatbot Evaluation Framework
description: Structured evaluation framework for an internal AI-powered employee self-service chatbot at Target. Assessed 7 quality dimensions: Intent Classification, Response Accuracy, Relevance, Actionability, Context Handling, Risk & Compliance, and Consistency.
